format.raw: CEF:0|Palo Alto Networks|Cortex XDR|7.5|THREAT|Endpoint Threat|10|src=$SRC_IP dst=$DST_IP spt=$SRC_PORT dpt=$DST_PORT fileHash=sha256abc123... fileName=$FILE_NAME act=$ACTION severity=$SEVERITY

xml.raw:
<Policy>
  <Parser parser_key="{@parser_key}" type="1" separator="CEF" version="0" arr_length="-1">
    <Field position="0"  name="device_version" />
    <Field position="1"  name="severity" />
    <Field position="2"  name="device_product" convert_tag="[[@toLowerCase()]]" />
    <Field position="3"  name="attack_nm" />
    <Field position="4"  name="fileName" />
    <Field position="5"  name="dstn_ip"       org_name="dst" />
    <Field position="6"  name="src_ip"        org_name="src" />
    <Field position="7"  name="dstn_port"     org_name="dpt" />
    <Field position="8"  name="fileHash" />
    <Field position="9"  name="cef_version" />
    <Field position="10" name="signature_id" />
    <Field position="11" name="action"        org_name="act" />
    <Field position="12" name="src_port"      org_name="spt" />
    <Field position="13" name="device_vendor" />
    <Field position="14" name="vendor"        convert_tag="[[@set('paloaltonetworks')]]" />
    <Field position="15" name="original_log"  convert_tag="[[@originalLog()]]" />
    <Field position="16" name="parser_version" convert_tag="[[@set('v1')]]" />
    <Field position="17" name="model"         convert_tag="[[@set('cortexagent')]]" />
    <Field position="18" name="logtype"       convert_tag="[[@set('threat')]]" />
    <Field position="19" name="parser_info"   convert_tag="[[@set('[PaloAlto]_cortex-xdr_threat_v1_cef')]]" />
    <Field position="20" name="eqp_type"      convert_tag="[[@set('xdr')]]" />
  </Parser>
</Policy>
